ExposoGraph.engine¶

NetworkX-backed graph engine for building and querying the knowledge graph.

class ExposoGraph.engine.GraphEngine[source]¶

Bases: object

Thin wrapper around a NetworkX MultiDiGraph that speaks our domain model.

add_node(node)[source]¶
Parameters:

node (Node)

Return type:

None

add_edge(edge)[source]¶
Parameters:

edge (Edge)

Return type:

None

remove_node(node_id)[source]¶
Parameters:

node_id (str)

Return type:

None

remove_edge(source, target, key=None)[source]¶
Parameters:

  • source (str)

  • target (str)

  • key (str | None)

Return type:

None

load(kg)[source]¶

Load a KnowledgeGraph, skipping edges with missing node references.

Returns a list of warning messages for any skipped edges.

Parameters:

kg (KnowledgeGraph)

Return type:

list[str]

merge(kg)[source]¶

Additive merge — new nodes/edges are added, existing ones updated.

Returns a list of warning messages for any skipped edges.

Parameters:

kg (KnowledgeGraph)

Return type:

list[str]

clear()[source]¶
Return type:

None

property node_count: int¶
property edge_count: int¶

Parameters:

node_id (str)

Return type:

dict[str, Any] | None

Parameters:

node_id (str)

Return type:

list[str]

Parameters:

node_type (str)

Return type:

list[dict[str, Any]]

Return type:

dict[str, list]

to_knowledge_graph()[source]¶

KnowledgeGraph

indent (int)
